name: Podcast Studio Team (merged into Content Studio)
description: MERGED into content-studio (2026-07-05). Publish-ready podcast episodes in Nick's cloned voice. This alias redirects to the unified Content Studio team.

orchestration.delegation_strategy: This team has merged into **content-studio**. Do not do any work here. Immediately invoke `Skill(skill: "content-studio")` with the user's original request verbatim. The Content Studio orchestrator runs the PODCAST pipeline (format selection → script → review gates → voice → master → show notes → publish).
